retry_reason: The get operations are unconditional and always succeed in normal operation; failure would indicate a kernel bug (e.g., refcount overflow), not a transient condition.
contract_summary: This function acquires references on both the bfq_group and its associated blkg. It is a compound get wrapper: after calling, the caller owns an additional reference on both objects and must later release each with corresponding put functions (bfqg_put and blkg_put). The operation is unconditional and always succeeds under normal conditions. There is no return value to check.
